label: Faction relation conditional maker
description: Runs the nested maker only when the player's relation with the specified faction matches the allowed relation flags.

factionDef.label: Faction def
factionDef.description: FactionDef whose relation to the player is checked.

allowHostile.label: Allow hostile
allowHostile.description: Whether the condition passes when the player is hostile with this faction.

allowNeutral.label: Allow neutral
allowNeutral.description: Whether the condition passes when the player is neutral with this faction.

allowAlly.label: Allow ally
allowAlly.description: Whether the condition passes when the player is allied with this faction.
